market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
articles.description: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

articles.title: Crypto funds suffer second-largest outflows of 2026 while XRP and HYPE attract inflows
articles.description: Investors pulled $1.67 billion from digital asset investment products last week, with bitcoin funds posting their largest weekly outflow of the year, according to a recent report from CoinShares.

articles.title: A new app, The Mall, is building a universal feed for online shopping
articles.description: The Mall lets shoppers build a personalized feed of brands, track sales and drops, and discover products across thousands of retailers.

articles.title: Saylor's Strategy sold bitcoin for the first time since 2022. These firms are still buying
articles.description: With Strategy breaking its accumulation streak and many peers stepping aside, the list of active digital asset treasuries has narrowed considerably.

articles.title: It's not 2022 anymore: What Strategy's first bitcoin sale can (and can't) tell us about this one
articles.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy has evolved into a far more complex bitcoin-finance machine since it last sold BTC three and half years ago.

articles.title: Ethereum's Vitalik Buterin is rethinking how DeFi handles market crashes
articles.description: In a research post published Monday, Buterin proposed creating index-tracking assets using options contracts rather than the debt-based structures that underpin much of DeFi today.

articles.title: Zigging when most are zagging, ex-Meta CTO raises $250M climate fund
articles.description: Mike Schroepfer's Gigascale Capital has raised a large fund to back founders building climate-friendly solutions for the world's energy and material shortages.

articles.title: Anthropic files to go public
articles.description: The company said Monday it has filed confidentially for an IPO.

articles.title: Michael Saylor breaks silence after Strategy sells $2.5 million in bitcoin
articles.description: Michael Saylor says Strategy aims to make STRC the world's best credit instrument after the company sold bitcoin to help fund preferred stock distributions

articles.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
articles.description: Windborne Systems' newest weather forecasting model beats the best government predictions by days.

articles.title: Strategy sparks panic with bitcoin sale, but analysts say it was 'immaterial'
articles.description: The move suggests a greater willingness on the part of Michael Saylor and Strategy to use BTC holdings to support the capital structure, said one analyst, while others disagreed.

articles.title: Are Ethereum OGs jumping ship? Here's what the data says
articles.description: Long-term whales have cashed out millions of dollars from Ethereum following the recent sell-off, potentially putting ETH at risk of further losses.

articles.title: Strategy’s bitcoin sale sparks a $14 million betting chaos on Polymarket
articles.description: The 8-K filing by Strategy Monday disclosed sales for the period May 26 to May 31, but the disclosure was issued on June 1. Polymarket's May 31 contract is sitting at 81% Yes and in review, while bettors argue over whether the onchain transactions or the filing date controls.

articles.title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
articles.description: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Revolut rolls out services to thousands of users in India ahead of broader launch
articles.description: The British fintech has built a waitlist of about 450,000 users in India as it prepares for a broader launch.

articles.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE breakout puts $100 price target in play
articles.description: HYPE has entered the breakout stage of its prevailing bull pennant setup with an upside target near $105, with strong fundamentals backing the bullish case.

articles.title: Recovery hopes fade as Kelp DAO hacker launders nearly all $220M in stolen funds
articles.description: The Kelp DAO exploiter laundered about $220 million worth of remaining stolen funds in a bid to make them untraceable, excluding the $71 million frozen by Arbitrum’s Security Council.

articles.title: Strategy sells 32 BTC in first Bitcoin sale since 2022; Stock falls on open
articles.description: The world's largest public Bitcoin holder reduced its stash to 843,706 BTC, while raising $128.3 million through Class A stock sales.

articles.title: Japan's ruling party supports crypto ETF trading, yen-based stablecoins
articles.description: Japan's ruling Liberal Democratic Party said the country should create a legal framework for trading crypto ETFs in a proposal to the finance minister.
